mechanics.excerpt: Though prepared storms follov, Kurita believed the compact was in the Combine'= best interests and knew he could justify militarily if necessary: On 13 March 3034 the affected worlds announced the formation of the independent Free Rasalhague Republic Despite Theodore Kurita' support; the declaration of inde: pendence touched off minor rebellion within the Combine , reactionary commanders refused t0 pull their military units from the new republic . Theodore declared the reactionaries ronin lordless and sent his own units drive them from Free Rasalhague.
